message:
fix(codegen): composite index prefix-equality probe key must span full key width, plus compat integration test

codegen.rs (bd-wwqen.4):
- Fix probe_key_regs allocation to span key_term_count + 1
  registers (all indexed columns + rowid suffix) instead of just 2
  (parameter + rowid). Previously, composite indexes with prefix
  equality scans had truncated probe keys that could match rows
  outside the equality slice.
- Fill trailing indexed columns not part of the equality predicate
  with Opcode::Null
- MakeRecord encodes the full composite key width
- SeekGE and duplicate-run Ne comparison reference correct first
  probe register
- Update test_codegen_select_by_rowid with proper CodegenContext
  including SelectPlannerDirective

codegen.rs (new test):
- test_codegen_select_with_composite_index_prefix_equality_
  anchors_full_key: creates schema with 2-column composite unique
  index (conversation_id, idx), asserts MakeRecord encodes 3
  fields, NULL filler targets second key column register, and
  Int64(i64::MIN) rowid lower bound placed after all key terms

compat/connection.rs (integration test):
- query_map_collect_composite_unique_index_returns_only_matching_
  duplicate_run: seeds real SQLite DB (via rusqlite) with 25,000
  conversations and 2 messages for conversation_id=1, queries via
  frankensqlite with INDEXED BY sqlite_autoindex_messages_1 WHERE
  conversation_id = ?1, verifies only 2 matching rows returned
- Tests both read-write and read-only (SQLITE_OPEN_READ_ONLY)
  connection paths
- Includes #[ignore] machine-local repro test for real CASS DB

.beads/issues.jsonl:
- Update bd-wwqen.1/.2/.3/.4/.6 issue statuses and comments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
